zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe de Bergues於大約1057年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德波格斯時，他的父親Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch40歲，母親Adèle de Thérouanne25歲。他於1075年與Blanche DE GUINES結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1109年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe de Bergues于大约1057年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德波格斯时，他的父亲Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch40岁，母亲Adèle de Thérouanne25岁。他于1075年与Blanche DE GUINES结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1109年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bergues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovenian: variant of Berglez (and, in North America, an altered form of this), from an old spelling of brglez ‘nuthatch’, probably used as a nickname for a person resembling the bird in some way. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the variant Brglez.

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe de Bergues was born about 1057, in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, was 40 and his mother, Adèle de Thérouanne, was 25. He married Blanche DE GUINES in 1075. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1109, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe de Bergues est né environ 1057, à Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Thérouanne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Blanche DE GUINES en 1075. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1109, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe de Bergues um 1057 in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch 40 und seine Mutter Adèle de Thérouanne 25. Er hat 1075 Blanche DE GUINES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1109 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Bergues è nato il circa 1057 nel Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de Thérouanne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Blanche DE GUINES nel 1075. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1109, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe de Berguesが約1057年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードバーグスで生まれた時，父Wautier de Bergues-St. Winochは40歳，母Adèle de Thérouanneは25歳であった。1075年にBlanche DE GUINESと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1109年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippe de Bergues(이)가 대략 1057년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 버구스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de Thérouanne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1075년 Blanche DE GUINES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1109년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Bergues nasceu aproximadamente 1057, em Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Thérouanne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche DE GUINES em 1075. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1109, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe de Bergues родился около 1057 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Thérouanne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche DE GUINES в 1075 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1109 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe de Bergues nació aproximadamente 1057, en Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Adèle de Thérouanne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Blanche DE GUINES en 1075. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1109, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
